eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Gila, AZ; Arizona; Apache; Cochise; Graham; Greenlee; La Paz; Maricopa; Mohave; Navajo; Pima; Pinal; Santa Cruz; Yavapai; Yuma, AZ; at 09:50 AM ON FEB 27, 2026 Effective until 05:50 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Gilbert Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. Gilbert Police Department is looking for Larry Hochstetler, last seen driving a Silver Subaru Outback with Indiana Plate 872LHQ. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
